description: John Butler is no pie-in-the-sky hippy. He has dirt beneath his feet: red dirt. He is well-known Down Under for his environmental and political commitment - putting his money where his mouth is. Founder of Jarrah Records, a family man and proud skateboard aficionado, Butler remains an enigma. He is from everywhere and nowhere, an Australian/American, whose music mixes rootedness and rootlessness, pain and celebration in a way that is utterly beguiling. He is the consummate rebel-refugee whose songs chart disenchantment with the corporate world and show a yearning for truth along with an ongoing struggle for a sense of locus.
subtitle: Australia
title: John Butler Concert
